content: Assalamu Alaikum ji, aap ki team kab rabta karegi toh bata de aap mujhe.
Walaikum Assalam sir! 😊 Khush aamdeed. Aap kis product ke baare mein information lena chahein ge?

aapko mene product ki tasvir bhejiye jo mene mangwaaya hai to mene mangwaaya hai magar ye jo hai ho bilkul mene kal bhi complain kari thi ye bilkul jo hai wo ek bhi kaam ka nahi hai ek mirch tak nahi kaat saka jo mene vegetable cutter mangwaaya hai aur 2100 rupees mere lage hai to ab aap ye bataiye ke ye refund hoga to iske badle me koi cheez denge ya phir paise wapas honge kya hoga kyuki ye to mere kisi bhi kaam ka nahi hai aap mujhe kindly ye bata den kyuki phir hum to online phir koi cheez mangwaayenge hi nahi hai agar aisi fake cheez aayenge to aap mujhe bataye please
sir, paisa delivery ke waqt dena hai 💵 7 din exchange guarantee ✅ FREE delivery 🚚 Aap check karke paisa dein.
admin_feedback: customer ne itni lamba message bheja us me voh complain kar raha lekin tumne yaha pe complaint status me add nahi kea

content: Bhai jo delivery dete hain, wo check nahin karne dete wo to, kehte hain ke aap apna parcha lein, aur humein paisay dein to wo product kis tareeqay se hum check karein wo product check thodi karne ke liye diye thi unki packing hoti hai, wo check nahin karte, wo paisay lete aur chalte bantay, wo check nahin karne dete ab aap iske return mein, ya to mujhe koi cheez dein ya phir kuch aisa karein, ke mera nuqsan to na hona dekhein itni mushkil se maine paisay karke diye the ke ek cutter aayega, to hamare kuch help ho jayegi kitchen mein magar ek mirch tak nahin kaat saka, to ye cutter meri kya help karega aap mujhe batai, aur batate hain itna bara cutter hai iski pata nahin kya price hai, jo maine upar aapko cutter ki tasveer bheji hai agar isse bara cutter 2100 wala hai, to phir wo aap mujhe exchange mein karke dein to aap mujhe wo exchange kar dein, ye to bilkul hi chhota cutter hai, na ismein koi cheez ja rahi hai, na kat rahi hai, na kuch ho raha hai to please aap meri problem solve karein, aur exchange mein mujhe
sir, aapka masla samajh aata hai 🙏 Main apni team se baat karta hun, woh jaldi rabta karein ge.

Yeh aap ne exchange guarantee li hai toh exchange mein aap koi cheez dain gay kyunki mere paas toh do din pehle hi yeh cutter aaya hai toh aap exchange mein jo cheezen de sakte hain us ke badlay mein woh aap mujhe bata dain toh main exchange mein koi aur cheez le leti hoon.

ap message krden kl tk ap ka issue resolve ho jayga

Assalamu Alaikum ji, main ne message bhi kiya, main call bhi kar rahi thi, call unhon ne pick nahi ki. Aur main ne message kiya to uska bhi ab tak jo hai woh na unhon ne suna hai aur na hi jawab de rahe hain. To please aap kuch kiijye aur unko phone kar ke aur boliye ke yeh jo hai woh mera message sunen taake mujhe exchange mein koi cheez mil sake kyunki main apne paise zaya nahi karna chahti.
walikumsalam ap message chor den bs us number pe , kl voh response krdeyga office hours me
Okay bas aap ye mera kaam karwa dijiyega please.
g ap tension nahi len

main kal se messages unko kar rahi hoon call bhi kar rahi hoon magar jo hai yeh jo aap jis par aap mujhe jawab de rahe hain to is par main kal bhi maine yeh picture bhi bheji thi messages bhi kiye the magar kal se leke ab tak mujhe koi bhi reply nahi mila tha ke exchange mein kya denge kya hai kya nahi hai na kisi team ne mujh se raabta kiya hai to ab kal dekhte hain aap bol rahe hain kal tak raabta kar lenge to dekhte hain kal tak aap ki team raabta karti hai ya yeh mujh se raabta karenge kyunke phir online phir koi bhi cheez mangwane ka dil nahi hoga agar yeh aisa karenge kyunke aap ne kaha 7 days tak ho sakta hai to please aap jo hain wo mera jo masla agar bahaal kar denge to phir aap logon ke upar jo hai wo hamara bharosa ho jayega ke haan bhai aap jawab dete hain aur phir hum log ainda bhi mangwainge agar nahi agar aisa hua to phir hum yahi samjhenge ke bhai yeh saari cheezein fake hoti aur ainda nahi mangwani chahiye to please aap kal tak mera masla solve kar dijiye ga please

aur maine jo aapna number diya tha na us par bhi maine ye video bhej diye zara unse bhi pooch le

Assalamu Alaikum ji, aap ne jo number diya tha us par maine yeh jo hai woh tasveer bhej di hai ke yeh mujhe jo hai woh exchange mein de de. To ab dekhein kya reply aata hai. Ab main bhi intezaar kar rahi hoon. To maine un ko bola hai ke main aap ki cheez wapas kar dungi aur aap jo hai woh yeh mujhe exchange mein de de. To ab dekhein ke kya reply aata hai. To maine kaha aap ko bhi kar dungi taake aap un ki yaad dena bhi karwa dein.

Ji aap mera message bhi nahin sun rahe hain mujhe reply bhi nahin de rahe hain aur jin logon ne mujhe kaha tha ke exchange kar denge unhone bhi na meri jo voice suni na hi mera mujhe message de rahe hain unko hi main ne yeh tasveer jo hai wo send kar rahi thi ke yeh mujhe bajwayen magar woh mera phone nahin utha rahe hain aur na hi jo hai woh mere mujhe jawab de rahe hain message ka bhi.
Jwab to dein
